segments.text: ...platforms, because Acero is at huge risk of getting completely dominated without them, so they said
segments.original_text: ...plataformas, porque Acero tiene muchísimo peligro de comerse un 0-10, entonces ha dicho

segments.text: Alright, now that I have platforms I can approach, and of course Anish didn't capitalize on it
segments.original_text: vale ahora que tengo plataformas ya puedo acercarme y claro Anish no ha aprovechado

full_text: ...platforms, because Acero is at huge risk of getting completely dominated without them, so they said Alright, now that I have platforms I can approach, and of course Anish didn't capitalize on it the lack of platforms.
